summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Global Jobs Consulting website - all 4-language support (RO/EN/DE/SR) verified across all pages. All pages load correctly with proper translations.
passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly in all 4 languages (RO, EN, DE, SR)
CandidatesPage (/candidati) loads correctly with all translations in 4 languages
ServicesPage (/servicii) loads correctly with all translations in 4 languages
ContactPage (/contact) loads correctly with form and all translations in 4 languages
EmployersPage (/angajatori) loads correctly with all translations in 4 languages
BlogPage (/blog) loads correctly with blog posts and translations in 4 languages
PrivacyPolicyPage (/politica-confidentialitate) loads correctly with all translations in 4 languages
Language selector works in navbar (desktop) - switching between RO, EN, DE, SR
Language selector works in mobile menu - all 4 language buttons present and functional
Cookie banner displays in selected language (tested RO, EN, DE, SR)
Navigation menu translates correctly in all languages
Forms display translated labels (Candidates, Employers, Contact forms)
WhatsApp button is visible with correct link (https://wa.me/40732403464)
Paula chat widget button is visible
Hero slider content translates in all languages
Stats section translates in all languages
Sidebar content on Candidates page translates correctly
Process steps on Services page translate correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: All multilanguage features verified working. Language stored in localStorage as 'gjc-language' with values 'ro', 'en', 'de', 'sr'. All pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing. Cookie banner, WhatsApp button, and Paula chat widget all functional.

cookie_banner.translations: Verified in RO, EN, DE, SR
